case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. THE ESTATE OF PATRICIA GARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICIY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JURGLEWICH, SHANNON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 SIXTH STREET #807, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
